response.justification: Aisha is a strong senior individual contributor with deep, relevant developer-tooling experience — test frameworks, test runners, CI/CD infrastructure, and even mobile app delivery — but the role is a Level II people-management position requiring at least 2 years of people management and 3 years of formal technical leadership. The resume shows no direct reports, no team-leadership roles, and no organizational-change experience; her leadership signals are limited to workshops, courses, and founding a small open-source project. She would be a better fit for a staff/senior IC role on this team than for the manager position.
strengths: Extensive developer-tooling and testing-infrastructure work (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, Selenium training, CI/CD and GitLab setup)
18+ years of broad software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Demonstrated knowledge sharing and mentoring through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: No formal people-management experience (0 years vs. the 2-year minimum)
No evidence of strategic roadmap ownership or leading organizational change
Mobile-platform experience is dated (2015–2016 iOS/Apple TV) and not at ecosystem scale

key_factors.factor: Lacks formal technical-leadership and org-change track record
